step.ask: What do you want Nexus to learn?
step.choose: Pick the option that fits best

plan.title: Plan the skill
plan.helper: Review what Nexus is about to build. Add any extra context, then bundle related skills if you want them rolled in.
plan.refineHelper: Anything Nexus should keep in mind — extra use cases, sample inputs, edge cases. e.g. "also use this for carousel and PowerPoint exports."
plan.refinePlaceholder: Optional — leave blank to build the skill as-is.
plan.bundleHelper: Select neighbours from the search to fold into the same skill (Nexus will study them in parallel and synthesise one consolidated SKILL.md).

ask.placeholder: e.g. Summarize my Slack DMs each morning
ask.helper: Describe the capability in your own words. Nexus will search trusted skill collections and show you the options.

searching.noProvider: Configure an LLM provider in Settings to search for skills.

choose.noResults: No skills matched that request. Try rephrasing what you want Nexus to do.

keys.title: Set up access
keys.intro: {{title}} needs access to a few services. Add the keys below — Nexus will store them securely.
keys.noneNeeded: No keys needed for this skill.

modal.title: Add {{name}}
modal.message: Paste the value from {{vendor}}. Nexus stores it locally — it never leaves your machine.
modal.messageNoVendor: Paste the value. Nexus stores it locally — it never leaves your machine.

build.title: Building your skill
build.intro: Nexus is studying the source skill and any related ones, then writing a clean version for you.
build.successDetail: Your new skill is installed. You can start using it in any chat.
build.failedDetail: Something went wrong while building this skill. You can try a different option.

bg.trackingStartedDetail: Nexus will keep building "{{title}}" and notify you when it's ready.
bg.successDetail: Derived from "{{title}}". You can use it in any chat.
